name: milletsmomo_an_order
description: PWA order tracking app for a momo shop

scripts.local:setup: docker compose up -d && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run local:db:wait && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run local:db:create && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run local:db:migrate
scripts.local:db:wait: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run db:wait -w apps/backend
scripts.local:db:create: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run db:create -w apps/backend
scripts.local:db:migrate: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run db:migrate -w apps/backend
scripts.local:db:seed: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run db:seed -w apps/backend
scripts.local:dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w apps/frontend" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run dev -w apps/backend"
scripts.local:build: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build -w apps/frontend && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build -w apps/backend
scripts.local:build:fe: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.local:build:be: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build -w apps/backend
scripts.prod:db:migrate: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run db:migrate -w apps/backend
scripts.prod:db:migrate:staff-logs: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run db:migrate:staff-logs -w apps/backend
scripts.prod:logs:purge: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run logs:purge -w apps/backend
scripts.prod:maintain:storage: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run maintain:storage -w apps/backend
scripts.prod:db:seed: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run db:seed -w apps/backend
scripts.prod:build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w apps/frontend && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w apps/backend
scripts.prod:build:fe: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.prod:build:be: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w apps/backend
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/backend/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/frontend/tsconfig.json
